Neuro Vision 2026

U
UKBCI
UKBCI 8 January 2026

Apply Now

Create a music-BCI system that translates EEG signals into musical performance. Whether through real-time synthesis, MIDI control, or algorithmic composition, show us how the mind can become a musical instrument.

Event Details

Now - Jan 8: Applications open

Jan 8-9: Selected teams announced

Jan 9-15: Preparation week (documentation provided)

Jan 16: Day 1 at UCL - Workshop & Development

Jan 17-18: Remote development weekend

Jan 19: Day 2 at Essex - Performance & Awards

To apply, follow the link or scan the QR code below

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfZ0mpMIm5R-MUS4AyXyjOjUPLq28USyxwGhfWeN-AD1KtlqQ/viewform

Flyer for the Neurovision 2026

Uniting UK researchers, clinicians and engineers to translate brain-computer interface science into clinical reality.
